title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Market Management Committee Resolution No. 2020-01 Dated December 16, 2020 ? Resolution Amending the Operating Hours of the Poblacion Public Market From 2:00 in the Morning to 6:00 in the Evening Starting December 22, 2020 and Everyday Thereafter.? (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 12/21/2020)
